articles.content: PNB reported a steady Q3 update with global business rising 9.6% YoY to Rs 28.92 lakh crore and advances growing 11%. articles.title: LIC's losses mount to Rs 10,445 crore in ITC in 2 days as stock plummets 13% after tax hike

articles.title: Siddhartha Bhaiya, the contra stock picker who turned Rs 10 lakh into Rs 4 crore in 13 years
articles.content: Siddhartha Bhaiya, the celebrated contrarian investor behind the India Opportunities Fund, built a 33% CAGR track record by spotting smallcap and midcap multibaggers early. articles.title: India's top smallcap multibagger hunter Siddhartha Bhaiya passes away after cardiac arrest
articles.content: Siddhartha Bhaiya, a prominent PMS fund manager, has passed away. He was the Managing Director of Aequitas, a firm managing Rs 7,700 crore.
